title: MLA for Old Fort says province should consider buying homes impacted by multiple landslides
description: The B.C. member of the legislature representing Old Fort, the community where a landslide has forced people from their homes, says he'll be meeting with constituents to discuss options for the future, including asking the province to buy their properties.
content: The B.C. member of the legislature representing Old Fort, the community where a landslide has forced people from their homes, says he'll be meeting with constituents to discuss options for the future… [+1908 chars]
de: Laut MLA für Old Fort sollte die Provinz den Kauf von Häusern in Betracht ziehen, die von mehreren Erdrutschen betroffen waren. Das B.C. Ein Mitglied der Legislative, das Old Fort vertritt, die Gemeinde, in der ein Erdrutsch Menschen aus ihren Häusern vertrieben hat, sagt, er werde sich mit Wählern treffen, um Optionen für die Zukunft zu besprechen, einschließlich der Aufforderung an die Provinz, ihre Grundstücke zu kaufen.
en: MLA for Old Fort says province should consider buying homes impacted by multiple landslides. The B.C. member of the legislature representing Old Fort, the community where a landslide has forced people from their homes, says he'll be meeting with constituents to discuss options for the future, including asking the province to buy their properties.
la: MLA pro Veteri Fort dicit provinciam debere considerare emptiones domos multis proruit impactis. The B.C. membrum legislaturae repraesentans Vetus Fort, communitas ubi homines e sedibus lapsus coegit, dicit se conventum cum constitutis ad optiones de futuro tractandas, inter quaeret provinciam ut possessiones suas emeret.

title: Johnston Canyon to close this fall for routine maintenance
description: Parks Canada says there will be no public access to the Johnston Canyon parking lot or the Lower Falls area for two to three months this fall. The agency is planning routine maintenance work to manage rockfall.
content:
Parks Canada says Johnston Canyon, a popular hiking area in Banff National Park, will be closing for routine maintenance this fall.
The agency says there will be no public access to the parking lot … [+3090 chars]
de: Johnston Canyon wird diesen Herbst wegen routinemäßiger Wartungsarbeiten geschlossen. Laut Parks Canada wird es in diesem Herbst zwei bis drei Monate lang keinen öffentlichen Zugang zum Parkplatz des Johnston Canyon oder zum Gebiet von Lower Falls geben. Die Behörde plant routinemäßige Wartungsarbeiten zur Bewältigung von Steinschlägen.
en: Johnston Canyon to close this fall for routine maintenance. Parks Canada says there will be no public access to the Johnston Canyon parking lot or the Lower Falls area for two to three months this fall. The agency is planning routine maintenance work to manage rockfall.
la: Johnston Canyon claudere hunc casum ad conservationem exercitationis. In procuratione operis sustentationem exercitatione agitat ut petram ruinam administraret.

title: Before and After the 2025 Tsunami in Alaska
description: In 2025, a retreating glacier in Alaska caused a landslide into a fjord named Tracy Arm. The landslide triggered a tsunami that swept down the fjord into the ocean. The tsunami reached a height of more than 480 meters, the second highest tsunami ever recorded.
